mapper.sql: id, service_id, date_key, total_calls, success_calls, failed_calls, avg_response_time_ms, max_response_time_ms, unique_users, version_no, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_service_statistics (service_id, date_key, total_calls, success_calls, failed_calls, avg_response_time_ms, max_response_time_ms, unique_users) VALUES (#{serviceId}, #{dateKey}, #{totalCalls}, #{successCalls}, #{failedCalls}, #{avgResponseTimeMs}, #{maxResponseTimeMs}, #{uniqueUsers}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_calls = total_calls + VALUES(total_calls), success_calls = success_calls + VALUES(success_calls), failed_calls = failed_calls + VALUES(failed_calls), avg_response_time_ms = CASE WHEN (total_calls + VALUES(total_calls)) > 0 THEN (avg_response_time_ms * total_calls + VALUES(avg_response_time_ms) * VALUES(total_calls)) / (total_calls + VALUES(total_calls)) ELSE VALUES(avg_response_time_ms) END, max_response_time_ms = GREATEST(max_response_time_ms, VALUES(max_response_time_ms)), unique_users = GREATEST(unique_users, VALUES(unique_users)), version_no = version_no + 1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mcp_service_statistics WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND date_key = #{dateKey} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_service_statistics WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND date_key >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND deleted = b'0' ORDER BY date_key DESC
SELECT DISTINCT service_id FROM mcp_service_statistics WHERE deleted = b'0'
